sections.paragraph:
Original: נחלה

Transliteration: nachălâh

Phonetic: nakh-al-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. possession, property, inheritance, heritage
    1. property
    2. portion, share
    3. inheritance, portion

Origin: from H5157 (in its usual sense)

TWOT entry: 1342a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
